contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Get in touch with us for consultation

orderFlowers.title: Order Flowers
orderFlowers.subtitle: Order fresh flowers from Hoa Nêu
orderFlowers.description: Hoa Nêu specializes in bridal bouquets, wedding decorations, and fresh flower services for every special occasion. We accept orders from Monday to Saturday each week. Please contact us at least 3 days in advance so we can prepare the most beautiful flowers for you.
orderFlowers.customOrder: For event orders or special custom arrangements, please contact us directly for a detailed consultation!
